mnemonics: My Nice Uncle Richly Makes Incredible Nachos
Mike's Nice Uncle Really Makes Incredible Novels
keyPoints: Define entities and attributes in conceptual design
Identify relationships between entities in conceptual design
Use ER diagrams to model relationships between entities
Map ER entities to relational tables
Identify primary keys and foreign keys
Use relational database design to create a logical database design
Use SQL to create database schema
Test and refine database schema for optimal performance
